name: Sorceress Sellen - The Graven Witch
description:
Beneath the crumbling stones of Waypoint Ruins, a heretic witch continues her work.

Once the most promising prodigy of the Academy of Raya Lucaria, Sorceress Sellen was cast out and branded the infamous Graven Witch after her research into the Primeval Current crossed lines the Academy dared not approach. Where other scholars feared forbidden knowledge, Sellen embraced it — experimenting with the very nature of glintstone, consciousness, and the limits of the mortal body itself.

To Sellen, the body is merely a vessel. Replaceable. Temporary. True power lies within the glintstone that houses a sorcerer’s mind and soul.

Now hidden beneath the ruins of Limgrave, she continues her dangerous research in secret

If you possess the curiosity — and the resolve — she may yet teach you secrets that even the Academy fears.
creator: Xaraphaes
